code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Cron Job
    participant A as API Server
    participant D as Database
    participant R as Redis
    participant F as File Storage
    participant E as Email Service
    participant DI as Discord
    
    Note over C,DI: Monthly Close Process
    
    %% Start Close Month
    C->>A: POST /admin/close-month
    Note right of C: Triggered on 1st of month
    
    A->>D: Get pending payables
    Note right of A: status: PENDING
    D-->>A: List of pending payables
    
    A->>A: Calculate total amounts
    Note right of A: Group by user, type
    
    A->>D: Create monthly report
    Note right of A: status: GENERATING
    D-->>A: Report created
    
    %% Generate Reports
    A->>F: Generate Excel report
    Note right of A: Payout summary, details
    F-->>A: Report file path
    
    A->>F: Generate CSV export
    Note right of A: For accounting system
    F-->>A: CSV file path
    
    A->>D: Update report status
    Note right of A: status: COMPLETED
    D-->>A: Report updated
    
    %% Process Payouts
    loop For each payable
        A->>D: Update payable status
        Note right of A: status: PROCESSING
        D-->>A: Payable updated
        
        A->>A: Process payout
        Note right of A: Bank transfer, etc.
        
        A->>D: Update payable status
        Note right of A: status: COMPLETED
        D-->>A: Payable updated
        
        A->>D: Create audit log
        Note right of A: Payout processed
        D-->>A: Audit log created
    end
    
    %% Send Notifications
    A->>E: Send email to users
    Note right of A: Payout notifications
    E-->>A: Emails sent
    
    A->>DI: Send Discord notification
    Note right of A: Monthly summary
    DI-->>A: Notification sent
    
    A->>D: Create notifications
    Note right of A: In-app notifications
    D-->>A: Notifications created
    
    %% Update Statistics
    A->>D: Update monthly stats
    Note right of A: Revenue, payouts, etc.
    D-->>A: Stats updated
    
    A->>R: Cache monthly data
    Note right of A: For dashboard
    R-->>A: Data cached
    
    %% Cleanup
    A->>D: Archive old data
    Note right of A: Move to archive tables
    D-->>A: Data archived
    
    A->>F: Cleanup temp files
    Note right of A: Remove old exports
    F-->>A: Files cleaned
    
    A-->>C: Close month completed
    
    %% Error Handling
    Note over A,D: Error Handling
    
    alt Database Error
        A->>D: Rollback transaction
        D-->>A: Transaction rolled back
        A->>E: Send error notification
        E-->>A: Error notification sent
        A-->>C: Close month failed
    end
    
    alt File Generation Error
        A->>F: Cleanup failed files
        F-->>A: Files cleaned
        A->>E: Send error notification
        E-->>A: Error notification sent
        A-->>C: Close month failed
    end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一下月底关账的完整流程。每个月1号凌晨，Cron Job会触发关账，然后API Server要处理所有待付款，生成报表，最后还要通知用户。
明白，那这个流程里涉及哪些存储和外部服务？我看到有Database，还有文件导出、邮件通知这些需求。
对，需要Database查待付款，Redis做缓存，File Storage存Excel和CSV报表，Email Service发通知，另外运营团队用Discord收汇总消息。
好的，我先画出主流程：Cron Job调用API Server的close-month接口，API Server从Database获取PENDING状态的待付款，计算总额后生成月报，状态先设为GENERATING。
报表生成这块要细化：API Server要生成Excel给财务看，还要CSV给会计系统导入，两个都存到File Storage，然后Database里报告状态改COMPLETED。
已加上。接下来是付款处理，我画了个循环：对每个待付款，API Server先改状态为PROCESSING，执行银行转账后改COMPLETED，同时写审计日志到Database。
没错。通知环节要三层：Email Service给用户发打款通知，Discord给运营发月汇总，还要在Database里创建应用内通知。最后更新统计并缓存到Redis。
清理环节我也加上了：Database归档旧数据，File Storage删除临时文件。另外我补充了错误处理分支——Database出错要Rollback并通知，文件生成失败要清理残留。
Rollback之后和文件生成失败，都要给Cron Job返回失败状态对吧？还有，错误通知也是走Email Service？
是的，两个alt分支最后都是A--C返回close month failed，错误通知都走Email Service。整个流程从Cron Job触发到完成或失败，闭环了。
